mapper.select: SELECT user_id, topic_id, created_at FROM notification_subscriptions WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_subscriptions (user_id, topic_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{topicId}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, topic_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM notification_subscriptions WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} AND user_id = #{userId}
